project_type: Next.js 16 multi-tenant SaaS CRM with TypeScript
build_system: npm with next build; Drizzle ORM for database schema
test_framework: vitest for unit tests, playwright for e2e; many tests excluded in vitest.config.ts
verification_instructions: Run npx vitest run to verify unit tests pass. Run npx tsc --noEmit for type checking.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node 22 available. No running PostgreSQL database for integration tests - unit tests mock db calls.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing code patterns. Use Drizzle ORM for schema. Use radix-ui and lucide-react for UI. API routes use requireAuth middleware with isSuperAdmin check.
key_patterns: Super admin auth: requireAuth(request) + ctx.isSuperAdmin check. Plans stored in drizzle/schema/infra.ts as 'plans' table. Permissions defined in lib/permissions/definitions.ts. Module gating via lib/modules/gate.ts and registry.ts with pricing per plan. UI pages are client components using fetch to internal APIs. FULL_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md documents everything.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js app router (api/, superadmin/, tenant/, auth/); lib/ - shared logic (auth/, modules/, permissions/, usage/); drizzle/ - DB schema and migrations; components/ - React components; tests/ - vitest unit tests
